title: Gears of War Judgement funny Glitch found in OverRun - Multyplayer
description:
Gears of War Judgement 
Epic funny Glitch found in OverRun Multyplayer mode BETA!!!!!
MUST WATCH




extra tags:
COG hero Damon Baird takes you through the finer points of OverRun, Gears of War: Judgment's thrilling new class-based competitive mode that pits Locust and COG soldiers in a head-to-head battle unlike anything "Gears" fans have experienced yet. I only use the sawed off for the first 8 waves or so & ONLY when I play Horde or run out of ammo for the gnasher. I've only used the retro in the beta. Otherwise, I only pick it up if I run out of ammo for the lancer or Hammerburst. I don't even know, or care, what medals I have. I LOVE gears of war, been playing the series since the first, but I'm not the type of player to give a damn about what weapons other players use or how they play. I don't care about stats, medals, etc.. Just a game. I think Gears of War is going to far with technological game play, like the deployable turrents, reviving stem gas grenades??? and enemy radar beacons? WTF EPIC THIS IS NOT CALL OF DUTY MODERN WARFARE!!! GEARS 1 WAS JUST FINE. GEARS 2 AND 3 GOT KINDA CARRIED AWAY WITH "FANTASY GAMEPLAY". IT REALLY BOTHERS ME THAT SUCH A GREAT FRANCHISE IS GETTING MIXED WITH UNREALISTIC WEAPONS AND GADGETS. IT DOESN'T MAKE SENSE. Wow. I wonder how much money and effort goes into this video, and no one notices the unnecessary apostrophe at 2:09. The word "mechanics" is not being used in a contraction. It is not implying possession. There is no need for an apostrophe there. Grammar rage. i'm guessing that is a joke cause lag ain't fun it is annoying also if your refering to gears on pc then i don't care, i only it on consoles this was a game that was made for consoles. some games just suit consoles or pc better gears suits consoles WAAAAY better do you have all the dlc? if not then you are playing on player hosted servers, not dedicated. also your comment on the gnasher was retarded considering you wished they'd remake gears 1, which was all about the lacer.
